events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.

events.name: phobos_transit
events.description: Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

diaries.text:
**Grove Ash** (earth/farmer) — Year 60

Another year. We are still here.

Another system down.
The dust never stops.

*— Grove Ash, farmer*

**Rust Tid** (fire/pioneer) — Year 60

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

Another system down.
The dust never stops.

*— Rust Tid, pioneer*

**Ora Flame** (fire/prophet) — Year 60

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

Another system down.
The dust never stops.

*— Ora Flame, prophet*
